title: Goa Tourism is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Goa Tourism is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Goa Tourism is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Chandigarh. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Goa Tourism:
Goa Tourism is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Goa Tourism!
